name: Happy Relationships
shortDescription:
Find your love

A group for women who want to build comfortable relationships.

If you want to understand yourself better in relationships, break out of repetitive patterns, and move closer to meeting your person, this group offers a safe and supportive space for inner work.
startDate: Starts in late May. Exact meeting dates will be agreed within the group.
fullDescription:
❖ About the group ❖
This group is for women who want to understand themselves better in relationships, break repetitive patterns, and move closer to meeting their person. We will move gently, but with focus, so the work truly helps improve the quality of your relationships.

❖ This group is for you if ❖
You want a relationship, but things keep not working out. You notice repeating patterns in partner choice, you find it hard to trust, open up, or maintain closeness, and you want more than a date — you want a healthy, warm, and comfortable relationship.

❖ What we will do in the sessions ❖
During the sessions, we will explore what is happening in your life and in your relationships right now, look for the patterns that stand in the way of the results you want, and gently work with them. Each session will be grounded in your real life situation.

❖ How we will work ❖
We will use psychological techniques, exercises, and tasks that help you better understand yourself, your reactions, your needs, and your inner limits. The methods will be selected for the group participants so the work is as useful as possible for you.

❖ Format ❖
Meetings take place once a week. Each meeting lasts 1.5 hours. The number of participants is limited to 10, and there will also be ongoing support in a Telegram chat. Between meetings, you will have a space to stay in touch and remain supported throughout the process.

❖ Group leader ❖
My name is Valentina. I am a psychologist and have already led groups for women who want to better understand themselves, their relationships, and repeating life scenarios. I will be happy to guide you through this path and help you move closer to meeting your person.
priceDescription: If you stop participating, you will be refunded for the paid months that remain, minus one month.
Partner referral: for every participant you bring who pays, you can receive a discount or a payout equal to 10% of her payment.
conditionsDescription: Meetings take place once a week
